title: Market Coverage & Completeness (GFG / TutorialsPoint / Scaler)
grader_note: Optionally augmented with a live web check (harness model.enable_web_market_check). Off by default; the judge uses trained knowledge of standard syllabi.
description: The final doc must match or exceed the depth of mainstream references (GeeksforGeeks, TutorialsPoint, Scaler, standard university syllabi) for the topic. Nothing important for the topic should be missing.
criterion: All standard sub-topics a learner would expect for this session are covered; no glaring omission versus mainstream references.

rubric.5: Matches/exceeds mainstream depth; no important omission.
rubric.3: Covers the core but misses one commonly-taught sub-topic.
rubric.1: Misses multiple standard sub-topics; thinner than mainstream references.

cases.rationale: Covers the full standard TCP/UDP syllabus.
Missing flow control, congestion control, reliability, comparison — far thinner than GFG/Scaler.
